articles.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz 'completely open' as US blockade on Iranian ports continues - Fox News
articles.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi announced Friday that the Strait of Hormuz is open through Iran's "coordinated route." President Donald Trump said a blockade on Iranian ports will remain in effect.

articles.title: Rapper Tory Lanez sues California prison system for $100 million over stabbing by inmate - abcnews.com
articles.description: Rapper Tory Lanez has sued the California prison system, claiming he should not have been housed with an inmate who stabbed him 16 times last year

articles.title: Live Updates: 2026 SoFi Play-In Tournament | Curry's Warriors face Booker's Suns - NBA
articles.description: The eight seeds in the East and West are on the line! It's winner-take-all basketball with Hornets-Magic and Warriors-Suns on Prime.

articles.title: Live updates: Life-threatening storms target the Heartland, intense tornadoes and huge hail possible - FOX Weather
articles.description: A dangerous severe weather outbreak is unfolding across the Heartland as supercells threaten to produce intense tornadoes and destructive, softball-sized hail. Follow our live coverage for real-time radar analysis, local storm reports, and critical safety inf…

articles.title: Trump came to Arizona to rally young voters. An older crowd greeted him. - The Washington Post
articles.description: Despite some empty seats, Trump projected confidence in his party’s ability to win the midterm elections. Some in the crowd focused on GOP divisions.

articles.title: Garret Anderson, the talented outfielder and Angels career hits leader, dies at 53 - AP News
articles.description: Former Angels outfielder Garret Anderson has died. He was 53. The multitalented player became the Angels' career hits leader and led the team to its only World Series title. The Angels announced Anderson’s death without immediately disclosing the cause or loc…

articles.title: D4vd arrested: Celeste Rivas Hernandez's family to give statement after singer's arrest - ABC7 Los Angeles
articles.description: The family of Celeste Rivas Hernandez, the 14-year-old girl whose body was found in singer D4vd's Tesla, will give a statement on Monday.

articles.title: ‘Outlander’ Shocker: Stars Break Down That Devastating Death, How It’s Different From the Books and Why They Asked for a More Intimate Final Sex Scene - Variety
articles.description: 'Outlander' favorite Fergus died in a fire on the show, a moment that changes course from the books.

articles.title: Trump to release reading of scripture days after angering many Christians - Politico
articles.description: The president has prepared an Old Testament reading for an event at the Museum of the Bible.

articles.title: Deaths of migrants in ICE custody hit record high under Trump - NPR
articles.description: Twenty-nine people have died in ICE custody since October, the start of the federal government's fiscal year, already surpassing 2004's toll of 28, the previous record, according to government data.

articles.title: 'Staggering' I was not told Mandelson failed vetting, says PM - BBC
articles.description: The PM is facing calls to resign over the revelation that Lord Mandelson did not pass security checks.

articles.title: Women's sports icons Sue Bird and Megan Rapinoe announce separation in joint statement - KOMO
articles.description: Sports legend Sue Bird and Megan Rapinoe announced their separation in a joint Instagram post on Friday.

articles.title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80% - BBC
articles.description: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.

articles.title: QVC Group, Whose Networks Popularized Shopping On TV, Files For Chapter 11 Bankruptcy - Deadline
articles.description: QVC Group, which pioneered live TV shopping but grappled with cord-cutting and digital competition, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.

articles.title: Anthropic CEO to meet White House chief of staff as US seeks access to Mythos model - Financial Times
articles.description: Dario Amodei met with Susie Wiles despite lawsuits over whether AI lab is a national security threat

articles.title: Nasa Shuts Off Instrument On Voyager 1 To Keep Spacecraft Operating - NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory (JPL) (.gov)
articles.description: To conserve power, engineers at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory needed to turn off one of the science instruments on the most distant spacecraft ever built.

articles.title: GOP senators urge Trump to find Iran exit plan as energy prices rise: ‘The clock is ticking’ - Politico
articles.description: “I think our members are going to be very interested in what next steps are,” Senate Majority Leader John Thune said.
